clue: Cleverly getting ahead via journey involving reversing trams
explanation: OUTSMARTING: cleverly getting ahead. OUTING (journey) containing (involving) SMART (reversing trams).
hints: The definition for this one is "cleverly getting ahead". (Emphasis on being clever!)
We need a word that means "journey".
That word is then going to involve reversing trams. That is to say, we are going to add "reversing trams" into our word for journey.
What letters can we get from "reversing trams"?
